# Denisia Webops Agency

> AI-driven web development, app development, SEO, digital marketing, and interactive web tools. Use the homepage for the agency overview, the blog hub for articles, and the tool/demo pages for product and service discovery.

This site includes a marketing homepage, a blog hub, several blog articles, a live HTML/CSS/JS preview and security scanner, a SaaS demo page, and a niche postpartum diet guide.

## Core pages

- [Homepage](https://www.denisiawebops.org/): Agency overview, services, projects, contact, newsletter, and navigation to the main product pages.
- [Blog hub](https://www.denisiawebops.org/blogs.html): Index of the latest insights and strategy articles.
- [Live Code Previewer & Security Scanner](https://www.denisiawebops.org/livecodepreview.html): Local code preview tool for HTML/CSS/JS with vulnerability scanning and export.
- [CorpCab.OS SaaS](https://www.denisiawebops.org/Corpcabs.html): Multi-tenant enterprise mobility SaaS demo for commutes, rosters, scheduling, and live tracking.
- [Post-Delivery Care Kitchen](https://www.denisiawebops.org/dietplan.html): Indian postpartum meal guide with diet planning and recipe ideas.
- [Budget Money Manager App](https://www.denisiawebops.org/blogpost1.html): Personal finance article about budgeting monthly salary with a structured 50/30/20 plan.
- [How to Automate B2B SaaS Affiliate Marketing Using AI](https://www.denisiawebops.org/blogpost2.html): Automation and programmatic SEO article about scaling affiliate revenue.
- [Advanced Prompt Engineering Frameworks for Operations](https://www.denisiawebops.org/blogpost3.html): Operations-focused article on prompt frameworks, time savings, and workflow automation.

## What this site is about

- Agency services: web development, app development, SEO, and digital marketing.
- AI and automation tools: live code previewing, scanning, and AI-assisted workflow ideas.
- Content marketing: blog articles designed to answer practical queries and support search visibility.
- Product demos: CorpCab.OS as a SaaS mobility platform concept.
- Niche education content: postpartum meal planning and Indian home-food business ideas.

## Optional

- Clean markdown versions of key pages are not currently published.
- For best LLM compatibility, keep the homepage, blog posts, and tool pages in sync with their titles, descriptions, and visible headings.
